name: Cost Per Click
definition: The cost paid for each ad click.

name: Cost Per Action
definition: The cost for a defined conversion action (signup, download, purchase).

name: Cost Per Lead
definition: The cost to acquire a lead (contact info, form submission).

name: Customer Acquisition Cost
definition: Total cost to acquire a new customer, including ads and sales.

name: Reach
definition: The number of unique people who saw an ad or content.

name: Impressions
definition: Total number of times an ad is shown, including repeat views.

name: Engagement Rate
definition: Engagements (likes, shares, comments, clicks) divided by impressions.

name: Bounce Rate
definition: Percent of visitors who leave after viewing only one page.

name: Session Duration
definition: Average time users spend on the site in a session.

name: Lifetime Value
definition: Total profit a customer generates over their lifetime.

name: Retention Rate
definition: Percent of customers who return for repeat purchases or renewals.

name: Churn Rate
definition: Percent of customers who stop using a product or service.

name: Landing Page
definition: A page focused on one goal: conversion or lead capture.

name: Call To Action
definition: A prompt that tells users what action to take next.

name: Lead
definition: A potential customer who has shown interest and shared contact details.

name: A/B Testing
definition: Comparing two variants to see which performs better.

name: Target Audience
definition: The group most likely to buy based on needs and behaviors.
